name: Utah forklift machine hit me at work—who pays medical?
description: Workers comp pays medical bills fully[4].

mainEntity.name: Utah forklift machine hit me at work—who pays medical?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp pays medical bills fully[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers comp covers 100% medical if work-related.** No deductibles[1][4]. **Key factors:** Authorized providers. **Practical guidance:** Go to ER if needed; bill employer insurer. Lawyer ensures full coverage.
